text: The video demonstrates the use of near-infrared laparoscopic fluorescence to confirm perfusion adequacy of an ileocolic anastomosis during a laparoscopic right hemicolectomy. The side-to-side ileocolic anastomosis is visible under standard white light. Indocyanine green is administered, and fluorescence uptake is observed at the anastomosis and throughout the small bowel, indicating satisfactory perfusion.
